overall_assessment: The paper appears to be free of hallucinations. All reported experimental results (column coverage metrics, modification depth analysis, algorithm comparison, temporal drift false positive rates, scalability exponent, and multi-version degradation values) are consistent with the underlying code and experimental data files. The numerical values reported in the paper match the experimental outputs within reasonable rounding. The methodology described (hash-based row-level comparison, MD5 hashing, synthetic dataset generation) accurately reflects the implemented code. While the paper has formatting issues with broken references (shown as ?? and ?), these are not hallucinations but rather LaTeX compilation artifacts typical of double-blind submissions.
